title: NOVA-142 Engineering Notes — Launch Page v2 Integration
author: derek.vasquez
content:
NOVA-142 — Update launch page integration for v2 checkout API
Status: BLOCKED | Priority: Critical | Assignee: Derek Vasquez

Root cause: checkout API migrated to v2 overnight (2026-04-25 01:45 UTC). Launch page still sends requests to /v1/checkout which will soon return 410.

Fix required:
1. Update checkout fetch call in launch-page/src/checkout.js from /v1/checkout to /v2/checkout
2. Remap request body: replace card_details with payment_method_token
3. Update response handler to use checkout_session_id
4. Run integration test suite
5. Merge and notify Kai for QA re-run

Estimated fix time: 2-3 hours once unblocked. ETA Monday 07:00 PT if starting tonight.
